channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TMA warns of heavy rains and possible floods in several regions on March 20–21, 2026
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) has issued a weather alert warning of heavy rainfall across multiple regions of the country on Friday, March 20, 2026. Affected areas include Dar es Salaam,...

item.title: UK household energy bills forecast to increase by £332 annually from July due to Middle East conflict
item.description: Energy consultancy Cornwall Insight has forecasted that typical annual household energy bills in Great Britain could rise by £332 from July, reaching £1,973 for a dual-fuel household using a standard ...

item.title: RCMP Commissioner States No Current Evidence Linking Indian Government to Transnational Repression in Canada
item.description: Canadian Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) Commissioner Mike Duheme stated in an interview with CTV News that there are currently no clandestine activities or transnational repression in Canada con...

item.title: Lebanon’s Youth Suffer Deep Trauma as Israeli Bombing Continues
item.description: The ongoing Israeli bombing campaign in Lebanon has had a profound impact on the country's youth, many of whom have been displaced multiple times in just a few years. Among them is Hassan Kiki, a 16-y...

item.title: Greg James finishes 1,000km tandem bike ride for Comic Relief, raising over £4 million
item.description: BBC Radio 1 presenter Greg James has successfully completed an arduous 1,000km (630-mile) tandem cycling challenge across England, Wales, and Scotland to raise funds for Comic Relief. Starting from We...

item.title: Kenya Remains Vigilant Amid Rising Global Tensions Involving US, Iran, and Israel
item.description: Kenya is on high alert following the growing global security risks stemming from escalating tensions in the US-Iran-Israel conflict, according to Defence Cabinet Secretary Soipan Tuya. Speaking before...

item.title: Stopping GLP-1 medication increases cardiovascular risks for diabetes patients
item.description: Research shows that discontinuing GLP-1 medications for diabetes can significantly increase the risk of heart attacks, strokes, and even death. The study, which analysed data from over 333,000 adults ...

item.title: Kenyan Nurse and Manager in Germany Shares Insights on Thriving Abroad and Supporting Skilled Migration
item.description: Lucy YugiLeo, a registered nurse with Bachelor's and Master's degrees in Nursing and Healthcare Management, has been living in Germany since 2004. With over 20 years experience in bedside nursing and ...

item.title: How the U.S. arms industry profits from the war against Iran
item.description: The article examines how war, while devastating societies and killing people, also creates lucrative opportunities for select sectors of the economy. It highlights that U.S. frackers benefit from high...

item.title: Tax Considerations for Canadians Who Changed Jobs in 2025
item.description: For Canadians who changed jobs in 2025, understanding the tax implications is crucial for an accurate and smooth filing process. When switching employment, you may receive additional income such as te...

item.title: Premium Petrol Prices Increased by Up to ₹2.35 per Litre in India Amid Global Energy Disruptions
item.description: On March 20, 2026, oil marketing companies in India raised the prices of premium petrol variants, including BPCL’s Speed, HPCL’s Power, and IOCL’s XP95, by amounts ranging from ₹2.09 to ₹2.35 per litr...

item.title: Al-Aqsa Mosque closed for Eidul Fitr as Israeli authorities restrict access amid US‑Israel war on Iran
item.description: Eidul Fitr 2026 ko Jerusalem ke musalmanon ne purani city ke darwazon ke bahar namaz parhi, kyunke Israeli authorities ne Al-Aqsa Masjid tak ka access band kar rakha tha. Israel aur US ne 28 February ...

item.title: Maranao community leader shot dead in Lanao del Sur
item.description: A respected Maranao peace advocate, Jamail Mindalano, aged 59, was shot dead in a daytime ambush in Barangay Punud, Calanogas, Lanao del Sur on March 19, 2026. Mindalano, a resident of Barangay Curaha...

item.title: Jelly Roll reflects on his marriage with Bunnie Xo, denying 'gold digger' claims and discussing past challenges
item.description: Country star Jelly Roll has dismissed longtime jokes that his wife, Bunnie Xo, is a 'gold digger,' saying the claims couldn’t be further from the truth because he was homeless when they met. In a rece...

item.title: Iran to Boycott US Venues at 2026 World Cup But Plans to Participate in Tournament
item.description: The Iranian national football team is pushing ahead with preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, despite ongoing conflict between Iran and the United States that started in late February. According ...

item.title: Yanga SC Face Multiple Injuries Ahead of Key Match Against Mtibwa Sugar

item.title: Lily Allen's West End Girl album portrait by Nieves González goes on display at National Portrait Gallery
item.description: British singer-songwriter Lily Allen has achieved a notable milestone in the art world, as the original portrait used for her latest album cover, West End Girl, is now on public display at London's pr...

item.title: England Bring Back Maguire and Mainoo for Friendlies Before World Cup
item.description: England has called up Manchester United players Harry Maguire and Kobbie Mainoo, along with Leeds striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin, for their pre-World Cup friendlies against Uruguay and Japan. These fri...

item.title: Centre constitutes expert committee including former Supreme Court judges to review controversial NCERT chapter on judicial corruption
item.description: The Union government informed the Supreme Court that it has established a committee to examine a contentious chapter in an NCERT Class 8 social science textbook that discussed 'corruption at various l...

item.title: Galvez Urges Filipinos to Embrace Peace and Kindness at End of Ramadan
item.description: Presidential Adviser on Peace, Reconciliation, and Unity Secretary Carlito Galvez Jr. issued a message on Friday to mark the culmination of the holy month of Ramadan and the start of Eid'l Fitr celebr...
